Easyart is an art e-commerce and content: Easyart is an art e-commerce and content operation platform that integrates the collection of modern and contemporary art works, promotion of young artists, and new retail of light art. It has established long-term and close strategic partnerships with young artists, galleries, art fairs, and collectors from China and abroad.
Our aim is to support more young artists: Our aim is to support more young artists, cultivate the concept and aesthetic forms of mass art consumption, remove the stratification of art consumption circles, expand the contemporary art market at home and abroad, and provide a full range of art investment and art consumption services for professional art enthusiasts.
At Easyart, art institutions and artists: At Easyart, art institutions and artists can settle in by themselves, and offer their works. While customers can purchase them online. We believe that buying artworks should be as enjoyable as art life, with no falsehood or isolation, only great and simple art itself.

1. Please make the transaction within 7:
1. Please make the transaction within 7 working days after placing the order. Overdue order will be invalid automatically；
2. Only two terms of payment: Credit card, ApplePay；
3. All the artworks will be checked and packed by Easyart then shipped to buyers；
4. All artwork shall be delivered within 15 working days (delivery may be delayed by unexpected accidents or traffic) after checked and confirmed by Easyart. Also, for some artwork, delivery date is shown on the detailed description page；
5. If Easyart determines that the artwork cannot be arranged, or for other reasons, we may cancel your order；
6. International shipping fee including logistics and tariffs will be charged；
7. Please check the delivery status on arrival to confirm the artwork condition；
8. No returns-with-no-reason for all artwork orders；
